description: Creates a reversed (flipped) 3D vector with opposite direction. The reversed vector pivots around the start point of the original vector.
utility: Reverse a 3D vector's direction around its start point.

examples.expression: G = g3d(at(4,20), view(20, 20)); V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 2, 3); V2 = reverse3d(V)

examples.scenario: Use reversed vector in another operation
examples.expression: G = g3d(at(4,20), view(20, 20)); V = vector3d(G, 1, 1, 1, 3, 1, 1); V2 = reverse3d(V); V3 = forward3d(V2)
